target_audience: Senior product leaders, AI founders, relevant recruiters, and event organisers
authority_goal: Be remembered for practical product judgment in building reliable enterprise AI systems

proof_inventory.label: Public decision-system repository
proof_inventory.public_safe_claim: A public repository demonstrates a reusable product-decision workflow.

proof_inventory.label: Public-safe operator case
proof_inventory.public_safe_claim: A reviewed case demonstrates a concrete product decision and its trade-offs.

avoid_topics: News commentary without an original product decision
